backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (UserProfile, Couple, planners, journal entries, VisionBoard) and state maps for a couples planning app, with authorization setup via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the milestone input in VisionBoard.tsx was replaced with a plus-button interaction pattern (text input + Add button) matching the task-addition UX.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, recent changes, and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, border, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app titled 'Future Us', mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TSX entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component setting up TanStack Router with all page routes, a navigation bar, profile setup modal, couple mode badge, and authentication controls using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated (or anonymous) ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state, persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all backend data operations including user profiles, couple management, vision board, daily planner, and journal entries. Defines a custom CoupleCreateErrorException for typed error handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm cream/amber light theme and a corresponding dark theme, plus reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CoupleSettings.tsx: Page component for managing couple connections, allowing users to link with a partner via Principal ID or dissolve an existing couple, with error handling and copy-to-clipboard support.
frontend/src/pages/DailyPlanner.tsx: Daily planner page with date navigation supporting mood tracking, tasks, schedule items, and water intake, plus a read-only partner view showing the partner's planner entry for the selected date.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying a daily inspirational quote, today's task progress, vision board goal summaries, and navigation shortcuts to other app sections.
frontend/src/pages/JournalSection.tsx: Tabbed journal page supporting four journal types (daily, emotional, night reflection, growth) with date navigation, editable forms, and a read-only partner journal view.
frontend/src/pages/MonthlyPlanner.tsx: React page for a monthly planner that lets users manage goals, important dates, budgets, moods, and notes for a given month, with a read-only partner view fetched via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/VisionBoard.tsx: React page displaying a vision board where users can create, edit, delete, and track progress on categorized life goals, with a read-only tab showing the partner's entries.
frontend/src/pages/WeeklyPlanner.tsx: React page for a weekly planner supporting priorities, habit tracking, and tasks for a given ISO week, with navigation controls and a read-only partner view.
frontend/src/pages/YearlyPlanner.tsx: React page for a yearly planner covering word of the year, major goals, vision images, and habit tracking across months, with a read-only partner view.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (cream, amber, rose, taupe, pastel-brown, sidebar, chart, etc.), border radii, box shadows, and enabling dark mode via class. Includes typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state at version 3, recording an existing feature and a pending action request (AR-1) both focused on replacing one-per-line milestone input fields with a plus-sign button interaction pattern matching how tasks are added.
